name: Rank-Up-Magic Admiration of the Thousands
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＵＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ランクアップマジック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>千死蛮巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アドマイヤー・デス・サウザンド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 or more Xyz Monsters in each GY, all of the same Rank; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" or "CXyz" monster that is 1 Rank higher than those monsters, and attach those monsters to it as material. You cannot Special Summon other monsters during the turn you activate this card. You can only activate 1 "Rank-Up-Magic Admiration of the Thousands" per turn.
eff: Target 1 or more Xyz Monsters in each GY, all of the same Rank; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" or "CXyz" monster that is 1 Rank higher than those monsters, and attach those monsters to it as material. You cannot Special Summon other monsters during the turn you activate this card. You can only activate 1 "Rank-Up-Magic Admiration of the Thousands" per turn.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

action: Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
